name: Freehold Land
description: Land owned with no expiration date

name: Accumulated Depreciation - Freehold Land
description: Contra-account to record any permanent, severe drop in the value of the freehold land.

name: Accumulated Depreciation - Office & Computer Equipment
description: Contra-account for office and IT equipment

name: Renovation
description: Costs incurred to upgrade, alter, or customize a workspace

name: Right-of-Use (ROU) Assets
description: Right to use a leased asset

name: Investment Property - Cost
description: Properties held for rentall or capital appreciation

name: Goodwill
description: Premium paid during a business acquisition

name: Biological Assets
description: Bearer Plants and Consumable Biological Assets

name: Other Non-Current Assets / Other Investments
description: Parent account for other non-current assets / Investments

name: Deferred Tax Assets
description: Parent account for deferred tax assets

name: Cash and cash equivalents
description: Parent account for all cash equivalents

name: Cash In Hand
description: Petty cash and cash on hand

name: Bank Suspense Account
description: Temporary holding for unidentified bank lines

name: Funds in Transit
description: Funds transferring between accounts or gateways

name: Trade Receivable (PoS)
description: Receivables from Point of Sale systems

name: Other Receivables, Deposits and Prepayments
description: Parent account for non-trade related receivables

name: SST Receivable
description: To track approved SST refunds, bad debt relief claims, or SST overpayments owed by Customs.

name: Utility & Rental Deposit
description: Deposits paid for office rent and utilities

name: Amount Due from Directors
description: Parent account for advances or loans to directors

name: Current Tax Assets
description: Parent account for current tax assets

name: Raw Materials
description: Raw ingredients, parts, and materials that have not yet been used in production.

name: Finished Goods
description: Completed products that are ready to be packaged, shipped, and sold to customers.

name: Share Capital
description: Parent account for share capital and premium

name: Retained Earnings
description: Accumulated , distributable profits of the company.

name: Revaluation Reserve
description: Surplus arising from the revaluation of PPE

name: Revaluation Surplus on PPE
description: Non-distributable paper gains from the upward revaluation of PPE

name: Foreign Currency Translation Reserve
description: Exchange differences arising from translating foreign operations

name: Foreign Currency Translation Reserve
description: Exchange differences arising from translating foreign operations

name: Non-Controlling Interests
description: Portion of equity not attributable to the parent company

name: Non-Controlling Interests (NCI)
description: Portion of equity not attributable to the parent company

name: Financial liabilities (Non-current)
description: Parent account for non-current financial liabilities

name: Long-Term Bank Loans
description: The principal balance of long-term cash loans due after 12 months.

name: Finance Lease Liabilities
description: The principal portion of the hire purchase obligation that is due after the next 12 months.

name: Deferred Tax Liabilities
description: Parent account for deferred tax liabilities

name: Customers Deposits
description: For refundable deposits or partial down payments.

name: Amount Due to Related Companies
description: Advances or loans from related companies

name: SST Payable
description: Sales and Service Tax (SST) payable to Customs

name: Deferred Income
description: Services paid for in advance but not yet delivered

name: Accrued Audit & Tax Fees
description: Accrued expenses for audit and tax fees

name: Financial Liabilities (Current)
description: Parent account for current financial liabilities

name: Bank Overdrafts
description: Short-term obligation to banks, repayable on demand

name: Bankers' Acceptances
description: Short-term trade liabilities drawn under the bank's Bankers’ Acceptance facility

name: Current Tax Liabilities
description: Parent account for current tax liabilities

name: SST Control Account
description: Summary account to track SST collected from customers and paid to suppliers

name: General Provisions
description: Provisions for warranties, legal claims, etc.

name: Opening Stock
description: Opening Stock for the financial period

name: Trade Costs
description: Direct cost of goods or services sold

name: Goods for Resale
description: Purchases of finished goods for resale

name: Production Overheads
description: All indirect costs incurred inside a factory or manufacturing facility during the production process

name: Staff Welfare
description: Non-salary costs incurred by a company to maintain employee health, comfort, and morale.

name: Administrative Expenses
description: Parent account for office and administrative expenses

name: Upkeep of Office
description: General upkeep and maintainance of office

name: Carriage Outwards
description: Delivery / shipping costs paid to send finished goods out to your customers.

name: Vehicle Expenses
description: Parent account for facilities and vehicles

name: Property, Plant and Equipment Written Off
description: Written off Property, Plant and Equipment (PPE)

name: Fines and Penalties
description: Fines and Penalties from goverment authorities

name: Amortization Exp - Trademarks & Brand Names
description: Amortization of Trademarks and Brand Names

name: Share of Profit/Loss of Associates & JVs
description: Parent account for share of associates/JVs

name: Under / (Over) Provision Tax in Prior Years
Undistributed Profits/Losses
description: Final equity account where the current year's profit or loss is closed.
